name: aur-search
title: AUR Search
description: Search Arch User Repository packages from Beam.
author: beam-launcher

commands.name: search-aur
commands.title: Search AUR Packages
commands.description: Search Arch User Repository packages by name or description.

commands.name: aur-grid
commands.title: AUR Grid Explorer
commands.description: Exercise Beam grid rendering with AUR package cards.

commands.name: aur-form
commands.title: AUR Install Recipe
commands.description: Exercise Beam form controls with an AUR install recipe builder.

commands.name: aur-detail
commands.title: AUR Extension Guide
commands.description: Open a detail-only command that documents the AUR test extension.

commands.name: aur-no-view
commands.title: AUR Quick HUD
commands.description: Exercise Beam's no-view extension flow with a HUD and toast.

preferences.name: defaultQuery
preferences.title: Suggested Search Query
preferences.description: Pre-fill the AUR examples with a starter package query when the command opens.

preferences.name: defaultSortMode
preferences.title: Default Sort Mode
preferences.description: Choose the initial sort mode for the AUR list and grid views.

preferences.name: packageScope
preferences.title: Package Scope
preferences.description: Filter the visible AUR results to all packages, maintained packages, or orphaned packages.

preferences.name: showExampleQueries
preferences.title: Example Query Presets
preferences.description: Show preset AUR searches when the search field is empty.
preferences.label: Show example queries when search is empty

preferences.name: preferredHelper
preferences.title: Suggested AUR Helper
preferences.description: Use this helper when generating install commands in the AUR example extension.
